title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at FabHotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at FabHotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, FabHotels in Aurangabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FabHotels:
FabHotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabHotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
